title: Overlay pin icon and X button on pinned video thumbnail

requirements.summary: Overlay the unpin (X) button absolutely at the top-right corner of the pinned video container with hover effect, removing any separate header row that previously housed it.
acceptanceCriteria: The X (unpin) button is absolutely positioned at the top-right corner of the pinned video container.
The button is styled as a small circular icon button with a semi-transparent dark background.
Hovering the button darkens its background.
Clicking the button unpins the video (calls useUnpinVideo mutation).
No separate header row for the unpin button exists; the space previously used by it is reclaimed.

file_operations.description: Refactor the PinnedVideo component to remove any existing header row or dedicated unpin button section. Move the unpin button to be absolutely positioned at top-2 right-2 within the video container. Style the button as a small circular element (w-6 h-6 rounded-full bg-black/50 text-white) with hover:bg-black/70. Ensure the video embed container has position relative to support absolute positioning of the overlaid button. The button should display an X icon (from Lucide) and call the useUnpinVideo mutation on click.

requirements.summary: Add a non-clickable pin icon absolutely overlaid at the top-left corner of the pinned video container as a visual indicator.
acceptanceCriteria: A Lucide Pin icon is absolutely positioned at the top-left corner of the pinned video container.
The pin icon is styled with the same circular semi-transparent dark background as the X button.
The pin icon is non-interactive (no click handler, pointer-events-none).
Both icons (pin top-left, X top-right) are visible simultaneously over the video embed.

file_operations.description: Add a Lucide Pin icon component to the PinnedVideo component, absolutely positioned at top-2 left-2 within the video container. Style it identically to the X button (w-6 h-6 rounded-full bg-black/50 text-white) but add pointer-events-none to make it non-interactive. Ensure both the pin icon and the X button are rendered as children of the video container so they appear overlaid on the video embed. No click handler should be attached to the pin icon.
